# Real-World Validation Set

**Purpose:** Evaluate ViFake model on manually curated samples that reflect actual Vietnamese social media patterns — not generated by the synthetic data pipeline.

## Methodology
- **80 samples** manually composed based on real scam templates observed on Vietnamese social media (Facebook, TikTok, Zalo groups — 2024-2026)
- **Collection approach:** Text patterns extracted from publicly reported fraud cases (ANTQ reports, Bộ Công an press releases) and safety researcher observations
- **Privacy-by-Design:** No actual user data — all samples are either rewritten to remove PII or are direct quotes from official public safety warnings
- **Labeling:** Triple-checked by team against the official scam taxonomy

## Label Distribution
| Label | Count | Rationale |
|---|---|---|
| FAKE_SCAM | 36 | Definitive scam patterns confirmed by Bộ Công an reports |
| SUSPICIOUS | 20 | Ambiguous content — could be legitimate or scam depending on context |
| SAFE | 24 | Normal youth conversation, homework, gaming |

## Scenarios Covered (FAKE_SCAM)
- Robux / Free Fire / MLBB diamond phishing (n=8)
- Crypto / USDT / MetaMask scams (n=6)
- OTP phishing (n=5)
- Gift card / iTunes scam (n=5)
- Fake job / CTV online (n=6)
- Romance/grooming lure (n=3)
- Fake scholarship/prize (n=3)

## Known Limitations
- Samples are representative, not randomly sampled from live platform traffic
- Domain shift from synthetic training data is expected (estimated F1 drop: 8-12%)
- Short texts (<20 tokens) may be harder for PhoBERT to classify confidently
